votes.reason: The Python code correctly translates the Coq specification, checking length equality and character-by-character case flipping according to the helper functions.

The Python code accurately translates the Coq specification, including the helper functions for character case checking and conversion, and correctly verifies the length and character-by-character mapping.

The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification. It checks that input and output have the same length, and for each character position: lowercase characters must map to their uppercase version, uppercase characters must map to their lowercase version, and other characters must remain unchanged. The helper functions IsLow, IsUp, Upper, and Lower match the Coq definitions exactly in their concrete behavior.
